title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_layers.py (第 221 至 570 行，共 570 行) ---
 221 |                     "item_index": {k: str(v) for k, v in self.item_index.items()},
 222 |                     "inverted_index": self.inverted_index,
 223 |                     "item_inverted_index": self.item_inverted_index
 224 |                 }, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
 225 |         except Exception as e:
 226 |             print(f"⚠️ 保存索引失败: {e}")
 227 | 
 228 |     def _rebuild_index(self):
 229 |         """重建索引"""
 230 |         self.index.clear()
 231 |         self.item_index.clear()
 232 |         self.inverted_index.clear()
 233 |         self.item_inverted_index.clear()
 234 | 
 235 |         # 遍历所有摘要文件
 236 |         for summary_file in self.storage_dir.glob("summary_*.json"):
 237 |             try:
 238 |                 with open(summary_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 239 |                     data = json.load(f)
 240 |                     session_id = data.get("session_id")
 241 |                     if session_id:
 242 |                         self.index[session_id] = summary_file
 243 | 
 244 |                         # 更新倒排索引
 245 |                         keywords = self._extract_keywords(data)
 246 |                         for keyword in keywords:
 247 |                             if keyword not in self.inverted_index:
 248 |                                 self.inverted_index[keyword] = []
 249 |                             if session_id not in self.inverted_index[keyword]:
 250 |                                 self.inverted_index[keyword].append(session_id)
 251 |             except Exception as e:
 252 |                 print(f"⚠️ 重建索引时跳过文件 {summary_file}: {e}")
 253 | 
 254 |         # 遍历所有 MemoryItem 文件
 255 |         for item_file in self.storage_dir.glob("memory_item_*.json"):
 256 |             try:
 257 |                 with open(item_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 258 |                     data = json.load(f)
 259 |                     item_id = data.get("id")
 260 |                     if item_id:
 261 |                         self.item_index[item_id] = item_file
 262 | 
 263 |                         keywords = self._extract_item_keywords(data)
 264 |                         for keyword in keywords:
 265 |                             if keyword not in self.item_inverted_index:
 266 |                                 self.item_inverted_index[keyword] = []
 267 |                             if item_id not in self.item_inverted_index[keyword]:
 268 |                                 self.item_inverted_index[keyword].append(item_id)
 269 |             except Exception as e:
 270 |                 print(f"⚠️ 重建 MemoryItem 索引时跳过文件 {item_file}: {e}")
 271 | 
 272 |         # 保存索引
 273 |         self._save_index()
 274 | 
 275 |     def _extract_keywords(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]:
 276 |         """从摘要数据中提取关键词"""
 277 |         keywords = []
 278 | 
 279 |         # 从摘要文本中提取
 280 |         summary_text = data.get("summary_text", "")
 281 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(summary_text))
 282 | 
 283 |         # 从任务目标中提取
 284 |         task_goal = data.get("task_goal", "")
 285 |         keywords.extend(self._tokenize(task_goal))
 286 | 
 287 |         # 从文件路径中提取
 288 |         files_changed = data.get("files_changed", [])
 289 |         for fc in files_changed:
 290 |             if not isinstance(fc, dict):
 291 |                 continue
 292 |             # FileChange 当前规范字段是 path；兼容旧数据中可能存在的 file_path
 293 |             file_path = fc.get("path") or fc.get("file_path", "")
 294 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(file_path))
 295 | 
 296 |         return list(set(keywords))
 297 |

 299 |         """从 MemoryItem 数据中提取关键词。"""
 300 |         keywords = []
 301 | 
 302 |         for field_name in ("kind", "type", "title", "content", "project", "status"):
 303 |             keywords.extend(self._tokenize(...
